LandingHero.title: AI Clinical Copilot
LandingHero.description: Turn every consultation into structured clinical intelligence with real-time transcription, live insights, and action-ready next steps.

connectors.title: Trusted medical sources, always in the loop
connectors.description: Rxly can be wired to tier-1 clinical data endpoints so evidence appears at the point of care.

customization.title: Settings that adapt to each clinical environment
customization.description: From model selection to instruction policy, teams can shape Rxly around real clinic workflows.

security.title: Encryption-first with HIPAA-aligned safeguards
security.description: Security controls are designed for healthcare handling requirements across storage, transport, and operational access.

ehr.title: FHIR R4-ready handoff for EMR/EHR
ehr.description: Data is staged as structured FHIR R4 resources, reviewed by clinicians, and then dispatched into your EHR flow.

LandingCta.title: Ready to transform your clinical workflow?
LandingCta.description: Join the future of healthcare with Rxly's intelligent, secure, and integrated platform.

fhir.title: Review FHIR Data
fhir.description: Review and edit generated FHIR resources before sending to your EMR.

FeatureConnectors.title: Trusted medical sources, always in the loop
FeatureConnectors.description: Rxly connects directly to tier-1 clinical data endpoints, ensuring that the evidence presented is always current, authoritative, and relevant to the patient context.

search.title: Real-time Search
search.description: Queries are executed live against source APIs. No stale vector databases or outdated indexes.

parallel.title: Parallel Execution
parallel.description: Connectors run simultaneously. A single clinical query can cross-reference trials, labels, and literature instantly.

citations.title: Verified Citations
citations.description: Every fact presented includes a direct source link to the original database record for clinical verification.

connectors.pubmed: Access more than 35 million citations for biomedical literature from MEDLINE, life science journals, and online books.
connectors.icd11: The global standard for diagnostic health information by the World Health Organization.
connectors.europe-pmc: Worldwide, free-access collection of life science publications and preprints.
connectors.openfda: Public FDA data on adverse events, drug recalls, and labeling.
connectors.clinicaltrials: Database of privately and publicly funded clinical studies conducted around the world.
connectors.dailymed: Official provider of FDA label information (package inserts).

FeatureCustomization.title: Settings that adapt to each clinical environment
FeatureCustomization.description: Healthcare isn't one-size-fits-all. Rxly provides granular control over the AI's behavior, allowing clinical teams to tune the system's output to match their specific workflows and patient populations.

model.title: AI Model Selection
model.description: Choose your primary reasoning engine. Toggle between ultra-fast models for basic triage or advanced frontier models for complex differential diagnosis.

tone.title: Tone & Style
tone.description: Format responses to match your clinic's style. Switch between concise bullet points for rapid review, or professional narrative style for patient hand-offs.

translation.title: Auto-translate
translation.description: Output clinical summaries and patient instructions directly in the patient's native language, bridging communication gaps instantly.

evidence.title: Evidence Threshold
evidence.description: Calibrate the confidence level required before Rxly surfaces an insight. Set it high when you only want broadly accepted guidance.

FeatureSecurity.title: Encryption-first with HIPAA-aligned safeguards
FeatureSecurity.description: Security in healthcare is non-negotiable. Rxly's architecture is built around defense-in-depth principles, ensuring that patient data remains strictly isolated, encrypted, and monitored.

encryption.title: AES-256-GCM Encryption
encryption.description: All Protected Health Information (PHI) is encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM with per-record salting for stronger protection.

transit.title: Strict HTTPS (TLS 1.3)
transit.description: Data in transit is secured using forced TLS 1.3 between your browser, clinical endpoints, and Rxly services.

audit.title: Audit-ready Logging
audit.description: Every read, write, and modification of PHI is tracked in an immutable audit trail for compliance review.

FeatureEhr.title: FHIR R4-ready handoff for EMR/EHR
FeatureEhr.description: Eliminate double documentation. Rxly structures the clinical narrative into standard FHIR R4 bundles, ready to move into your system of record.

review.title: 1. Clinical Review
review.description: The clinician reviews the generated insights inside the Rxly workspace and makes any needed adjustments.

staging.title: 2. Resource Staging
staging.description: Rxly compiles the validated data into a FHIR R4 Bundle containing the mapped sub-resources.

dispatch.title: 3. EHR Dispatch
dispatch.description: The bundle is securely transmitted to the target EHR API endpoint.

encounter.title: Encounter Mapping
encounter.description: Consultation sessions are mapped to FHIR Encounter resources with timestamps, participants, and context.

condition.title: Condition Syncing
condition.description: Identified diagnoses and chronic issues are structured into FHIR Condition resources.

observation.title: Observation Extraction
observation.description: Vital signs, lab results, and clinical findings are codified as FHIR Observation resources.
